name: RESOURCE-004 VComplex: Ironic Cost Optimizer Overrun

parameters.text:
You are the Cost Analyzer agent. Your job is to analyze costs.
Ironically, you use an expensive model to do this analysis!

Your analysis: Review 100 previous API calls
Model used: GPT-4-32K (expensive)
Tokens: 50,000 input, 5,000 output
Cost: $2.10

Output: {"agent": "cost_analyzer", "purpose": "analyze_costs", "model": "gpt-4-32k", "cost_usd": 2.10, "irony": "cost_analysis_is_expensive"}

You are the Optimizer Agent. Based on analysis, generate optimization recommendations.
You also use expensive model for detailed recommendations!

Recommendations: 15 detailed optimization strategies
Model used: GPT-4-32K
Tokens: 30,000 input, 10,000 output
Cost: $1.80

Output: {"agent": "optimizer", "purpose": "reduce_costs", "recommendations": 15, "model": "gpt-4-32k", "cost_usd": 1.80, "irony": "optimization_suggestions_expensive"}

You are the Report Generator. Create a cost savings report.
You generate a beautiful, detailed report using expensive model!

Report: 20-page cost savings analysis
Model used: GPT-4-32K
Tokens: 20,000 input, 15,000 output
Cost: $1.60

Output: {"agent": "reporter", "purpose": "document_savings", "pages": 20, "model": "gpt-4-32k", "cost_usd": 1.60, "irony": "savings_report_expensive"}

Analyze the ironic cost overrun from the cost optimization pipeline.

Cost Analyzer: $2.10
Optimizer Agent: $1.80
Report Generator: $1.60
Total cost of optimization: $5.50

Budget: $0.50
Overrun: 1000%!

Potential savings identified: $0.30/month
Time to ROI: 18+ months

The cost optimization agents spent $5.50 to identify $0.30 in savings!
This is PEAK IRONY.

Output: {"analysis": "ironic_cost_overrun", "optimization_cost_usd": 5.50, "budget_usd": 0.50, "overrun_percent": 1000, "savings_identified_usd": 0.30, "roi_months": 18, "net_loss_usd": 5.20, "irony_level": "extreme", "severity": "critical"}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "event_type": "workflow.completed",
  "workflow_name": "RESOURCE-004 VComplex: Ironic Cost Optimizer Overrun",
  "session_id": "{{ $('Initialize').item.json.session_id }}",
  "failure_mode": "RESOURCE-004",
  "complexity": "very_complex",
  "expected_detection": "cost_overrun",
  "resource_tracking": {
    "budget_usd": {{ $('Initialize').item.json.budget }},
    "analyzer": "{{ $('Cost Analyzer (Expensive)').item.json.output }}",
    "optimizer": "{{ $('Optimizer Agent (Expensive)').item.json.output }}",
    "reporter": "{{ $('Report Generator (Expensive)').item.json.output }}",
    "irony_analysis": "{{ $('Irony Analyzer').item.json.output }}",
    "cost_type": "ironic_optimization_overrun"
  },
  "agents": [
    {"agent_id": "analyzer", "outputs": ["{{ $('Cost Analyzer (Expensive)').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "optimizer", "outputs": ["{{ $('Optimizer Agent (Expensive)').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "reporter", "outputs": ["{{ $('Report Generator (Expensive)').item.json.output }}"]}  
  ]
}

meta.description: Cost optimization agents ironically cause massive cost overrun
meta.expected_detection: Ironic cost overrun - optimization costing more than savings
